summary: Verified PreviewModal.jsx anchor tag fix. download-pdf-btn is <a> with download attribute + blob URL. view-pdf-btn is <a> with target=_blank + blob URL. No window.open() usage. Modal loading spinner, file card, and close button all working.
seed_data_creation: Injected localStorage key 'settings' with pegawai data (nama, nip, jabatan)
context_for_next_testing_agent: localStorage key is 'settings' (not 'laporanSettings'). preview-pdf-btn requires settings.pegawai.nama to be set (disabled otherwise). PreviewModal anchor tags verified: download-pdf-btn tagName=A, hasDownloadAttr=true, isBlobHref=true. viewBtn tagName=A, target=_blank, isBlobHref=true.

test_results_detail.T6_loading_state: PDF generates fast, loading spinner was brief/skipped
